items.title: IBM (IBM) Ascends While Market Falls: Some Facts to Note
items.description: In the closing of the recent trading day, IBM (IBM) stood at $293.87, denoting a +1.54% move from the preceding trading day.

items.title: Stock Market Today: S&P 500 Ends Win Streak; Tesla's New Price Tag Doesn't Help Shares (Live Coverage)
items.description: Dow Jones average and other major indexes post losses Tuesday. Nvidia retreated.

items.title: These Stocks Moved the Most Today: Tesla, AMD, Ford, IBM, AppLovin, Trilogy Metals, Aehr, SoFi, and More
items.description: Electric-vehicle maker Tesla says it will roll out a pair of vehicles starting below $40,000, including a new standard Model Y starting at $39,900.

items.title: Trilogy Metals stock up over 200%, Seaport upgrades Netflix
items.description: Market Domination host Josh Lipton and Aptus Capital Advisors head of equity and portfolio manager David Wagner track several of the day's top trending stock tickers, including Trilogy Metals (TMQ) after the Trump administration took a 10% stake in the mineral company, Netflix (NFLX) receiving an upgrade by Seaport analysts, and International Business Machines (IBM) announcing an AI partnership with Anthropic (ANTH.PVT). To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination.

items.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Feels Pain; Rocket Name Soars, Challenges Musk's SpaceX (Live Coverage)
items.description: Tesla fell on the stock market today after releasing its Full Self-Driving product and announcing its new lower-priced models.  The Nasdaq composite was the hardest hit of the major indexes with a 0.7% drop.  The Nasdaq set a record high on Monday as did the S&P 500.
